global_description: A small, slender songbird with a pointed beak and a slightly rounded body. It features a striking combination of yellow and olive-green plumage with a distinctive chestnut cheek patch. The wings are dark with white wing bars, and the underparts are streaked with black.

part_details.head: Yellow with a prominent chestnut cheek patch and a pointed beak.
part_details.wings: Dark with two white wing bars, providing contrast against the body.
part_details.underparts: Yellow with black streaks running vertically.
part_details.tail: Short and dark, complementing the wing color.

spatial_relations: The chestnut cheek patch is located on the side of the head.
The white wing bars run horizontally across the dark wings.
The black streaks are vertically aligned on the yellow underparts.
